projects.caption: A personal project built with passion.
dialog: This was my first major project...
I learned so much building this.
It taught me to never give up.

projects.caption: Collaboration and creativity.
dialog: Working with others taught me a lot.

projects.caption: Late nights and coffee.
dialog: Some nights I coded until sunrise.

projects.caption: Always learning, always growing.
dialog: Every project is a new lesson.

projects.caption: The journey continues.
dialog: And there is still so much more to build.
